title: 關於我
text: 歡迎來到 BlueWhaleYT 個人網誌。Welcome to BlueWhaleYT’s Blog. 我會在這裏分享許多東西，一起學習，一起耍廢。I will share numerous things here, let’s start the journey with m...
content:
歡迎來到 BlueWhaleYT 個人網誌。
Welcome to BlueWhaleYT’s Blog.

我會在這裏分享許多東西，一起學習，一起耍廢。
I will share numerous things here, let’s start the journey with me!

間中會發英文教學文章，但是要注意我的英文很爛，很爛，很爛，因為很重要，所以要說三次。
I will write blog articles in english sometimes, but keep in mind that my english is not that good.

有些文章有機會在可見的將來加插翻譯為英文的版本，亦有機會加插翻譯為中文的版本。
Some of the articles might be translated into English or Chinese in the foreseeable future.

想知道我是哪裏人？香港。
I was born in Hong Kong, my friend.
